items.example: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
Look! It is raining outside.
The sun shines every day in summer.
She loves reading books in the evening.
He hates waking up early.
I know the answer to this question.
Do you understand the grammar rule?
She believes in hard work.
He wants a cup of coffee.
I need more time to finish this.
She prefers tea to coffee.
He seems tired today.
Look! She is wearing a new dress.
Listen! Someone is playing the piano.
Today she is working from home.
He usually takes the bus, but today he is driving.
She usually cooks, but today she is eating out instead.
It is raining outside, so I'm staying home.
She speaks three languages.
How many languages do you speak?
I think (= in my opinion) this is a good idea.
It's a fact that water boils at 100°C.
Brushing teeth is a healthy daily habit.
At this moment, she is studying.
Stative verbs are exceptions to the -ing rule.
